title: Soul Fysh

moves.title: Burp
effects: Add 2 Beckon status cards to player's hand (1 to draw pile, 1 to discard pile)

moves.title: Gaze
effects: Add 1 Beckon status card to player's discard pile

move_pattern: Starts with Beckon (Burp), then De-Gas, then Gaze, then Fade, then Scream, then repeats from Beckon.
notes: Boss monster with 221 HP. Beckon adds Beckon status cards to the player's draw and discard piles. Fade grants Intangible making the monster untargetable. Scream re-reveals the monster. BECKON_MOVE localization maps to 'Burp' title. GAZE_MOVE and FADE_MOVE have no localization entries.
